resources.string: TOTP je bil kopiran v odložišče

string.name: new_item_invite_notification_message
string.comment: the placeholder will be replaced by an email address

resources.string: %s želi dati predmet v skupno rabo z vami.

string.name: new_vault_invite_notification_message
string.comment: the placeholder will be replaced by an email address

resources.string: Prejeto povabilo za nov predmet skupine
%1$s želi deliti predmet z vašo skupino %2$s.
Prejeto povabilo za nov trezor skupine
%1$s želi deliti trezor z vašo skupino %2$s.
